# Tencent RTC
> Tencent RTC is a one-stop real-time audio/video solution by Tencent Cloud, covering Instant Messaging (Chat UIKit), Audio/Video Calling (CallKit), Live Streaming & Voice Chat Rooms (LiveKit), Video Conferencing (RoomKit), and the underlying WebRTC SDK. It supports Android, iOS, Flutter, React, Vue, uni-app and more, with pre-built UI components for rapid integration.
## Quick Start
- [AI Agent RTC Quickstart (MCP + UserSig)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/quick-start.md): Set up MCP Server, SDKAppID/SDKSecretKey, UserSig auth, and first tool call. Keywords: login, enterRoom, startLocalVideo, init, call, live, meeting.
- [Configure MCP Server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/mcp.md): Add Tencent RTC MCP Server configuration in Cursor/VS Code, set SDKAppID and SDKSecretKey environment variables to enable Chat/Call/Live/Room/TRTC tool capabilities.
- [RTC Skills Setup & Capability Mapping](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/skills.md): Install Tencent RTC Skills and trigger Chat/Call/Live/Room/TRTC workflows by intent. Keywords: skills add, login, enter-room, call, live, meeting.
## ChatKit
- [Integrate Chat UIKit (Android/iOS/Flutter/React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/integration.md): Cross-platform integration overview for Android, iOS, Flutter, React, and Vue. Covers auth login, conversation list, message list, message input, and contacts integration.
- [Customize ChatHeader (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/chat-header.md): Component and props: ChatHeader/ChatHeaderLeft/ChatHeaderRight, avatarUrl, enableUserStatus, header actions extension.
- [Customize ChatSetting Panel (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/chat-setting.md): Components and state: ChatSetting, UIKitProvider, setActiveTab; includes pin/mute/clear conversation settings.
- [Customize ContactList (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/contact-list.md): Components and callbacks: ContactList, ContactItemType, ContactInfo, onClick, showActions. Covers friend/group/block lists.
- [Customize ConversationActions (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/conversation-actions.md): Action config: ConversationActions, ConversationActionsProps, enablePin, enableDelete, custom actionsConfig.
- [Customize ConversationList (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/conversation-list.md): Composable list: ConversationList with ConversationSearch/ConversationPreview/ConversationActions/ConversationCreate. Keywords: unread, pin, search.
- [Customize ConversationPreview (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/conversation-preview.md): Preview rendering: ConversationPreview, ConversationModel, unread badge, last message, conversation click behavior.
- [Customize ConversationSearch (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/conversation-search.md): Search components: ConversationSearch, Search, SearchBar, SearchResults, SearchAdvanced, onResultItemClick.
- [Customize MessageInput (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/message-input.md): Input features: MessageInput, EmojiPicker, AttachmentPicker, autoFocus, hideSendButton, send callbacks.
- [Customize MessageList (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/message-list.md): Message rendering: MessageList, MessageModel, messageActionList, bubbles/time divider/read receipt.
- [Customize Global Search (React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/search.md): Global search APIs: Search, SearchType, SearchResultItem, onSearchComplete, onResultItemClick. Covers user/group/message.
- [Customize Chat UIKit Theme (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/features/theme.md): Customize chat UI theme colors, dark mode and visual styles via TUIKit, supporting Android Compose, iOS Swift and Flutter platforms.
- [Troubleshoot Android Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/faq/android.md): Resolve build errors, initialization failures, login exceptions and runtime issues in Android TUIKit Compose and IM SDK integration.
- [Troubleshoot iOS Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/faq/ios.md): Resolve compilation and runtime issues in iOS Chat UIKit CocoaPods integration and IM SDK initialization exceptions.
- [Troubleshoot Flutter Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/faq/flutter.md): Resolve dependency conflicts, build errors, login exceptions and compatibility issues in Flutter Chat UIKit integration.
- [Troubleshoot Web Chat UIKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/faq/web.md): Resolve browser compatibility, TypeScript errors, bundling and runtime issues in @tencentcloud/chat-uikit-react/vue3. Includes Web IM SDK error code reference.
- [Chat UIKit Billing, Server & Common Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/chatkit/faq/common.md): Compare Chat UIKit free vs paid editions, billing models, troubleshoot server REST API failures and callback configuration. Includes server error code reference.
## CallKit
- [Integrate TUICallKit Audio/Video Calling (Android/iOS/Flutter/React/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/callkit/integration.md): Cross-platform integration overview for incoming call, accept/hangup, media switch, and call UI integration. Keywords: TUICallKit, TUICallEngine, @trtc/calls-uikit.
- [TUICallEngine + TUICallKit Web/Mini Program API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/callkit/callkit-api-reference.md): Complete API reference covering 1v1/group calling, accept/hangup, media type switching for Web and WeChat Mini Programs.
- [Android TUICallKit FAQ & API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/android.md): Resolve audio/video permissions, call connection failures and UI issues. Includes complete API and callback documentation.
- [iOS TUICallKit FAQ & API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/ios.md): Resolve compilation errors and call issues in iOS TUICallKit. Includes complete API and callback documentation.
- [Flutter TUICallKit FAQ & API Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/flutter.md): Resolve platform adaptation, permission and build issues. Includes complete API, callback and type definition documentation.
- [Troubleshoot Web TUICallKit Issues](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/web.md): Resolve component rendering, call connection and browser compatibility issues in @trtc/calls-uikit-react/vue integration.
- [TUICallKit Error Code Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/callkit/faq/common.md): View complete TUICallKit error code list to identify issues and solutions for call initiation, answering and hang-up.
## LiveKit (Live Streaming / Voice Room)
- [Integrate Live Streaming Basics (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/integration-live.md): Integrate AtomicXCore LiveKit for live streaming: host streaming (LiveCoreView), audience viewing, room list, supporting Android, iOS, Flutter (no-UI integration).
- [Integrate Voice Room Basics (Android/iOS/Flutter/uni-app)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/integration-voice.md): Integrate AtomicXCore LiveKit for voice rooms: host broadcasting (LiveSeatStore/VoiceCoreView), audience listening, room list, supporting Android, iOS, Flutter, uni-app (no-UI integration).
- [Implement Audience List Management (LiveAudienceStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/audience-list.md): Use AtomicXCore LiveAudienceStore to manage audience: real-time list, count, join/leave events, admin permissions and kick operations. For both live streaming and voice room scenarios (Android/iOS/Flutter/uni-app).
- [Integrate Audio Effects (AudioEffectStore/DeviceStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/audio-effect.md): Use AtomicXCore AudioEffectStore and DeviceStore for audio effects: voice volume, ear monitoring, voice changers and reverb effects. For both live streaming and voice room scenarios (Android/iOS/Flutter/uni-app).
- [Integrate Barrage System (BarrageStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/barrage.md): Use AtomicXCore BarrageStore for barrage: receive/send text messages, custom business barrage and local system tips. For both live streaming and voice room scenarios (Android/iOS/Flutter/uni-app).
- [Integrate Live Basic Beauty (BaseBeautyStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/beauty.md): Use AtomicXCore BaseBeautyStore for live basic beauty: smoothing/whitening/blushing (0-9 intensity), one-click reset and state monitoring.
- [Implement Live Co-Guest (CoGuestStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/co-guest-live.md): Use AtomicXCore CoGuestStore for audience co-guesting: audience apply, host invite, accept/reject requests and off-mic management.
- [Implement Voice Room Co-Guest (CoGuestStore/LiveSeatStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/co-guest-voice.md): Use AtomicXCore CoGuestStore and LiveSeatStore for voice room co-guesting: audience apply, host invite, seat management (kick/mute/lock).
- [Implement Live Cross-Room Co-Host & PK (CoHostStore/BattleStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/co-host-live.md): Use AtomicXCore CoHostStore and BattleStore for cross-room co-hosting and PK battles: initiate/accept connection, start/end PK, timing and result judgment.
- [Implement Voice Room Cross-Room Co-Host & PK (CoHostStore/BattleStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/co-host-voice.md): Use AtomicXCore CoHostStore and BattleStore for voice room cross-room co-hosting and PK battles: initiate/accept connection, start/end PK, timing and result.
- [Integrate Gift System (GiftStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/gift.md): Use AtomicXCore GiftStore for gift feature: gift panel, send/receive gifts, barrage gift messages and full-screen gift animations. For both live streaming and voice room scenarios (Android/iOS/Flutter/uni-app).
- [Implement Live Room List (LiveListStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/live-list.md): Live list APIs: LiveListStore.fetchLiveList, pagination cursor, create room, join room, leave room, live info update.
- [Implement Voice Room List (LiveListStore)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/features/room-list.md): Voice room list APIs: LiveListStore.fetchLiveList, pagination cursor, create/join/leave room, room info and custom metadata updates.
- [LiveKit Error Code Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/livekit/faq/common.md): Complete LiveKit error code list for diagnosing streaming start failures, co-guest, PK and room exceptions.
## RoomKit
- [Integrate RoomKit Video Conferencing (Android/iOS/Flutter/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/integration.md): Cross-platform integration and project setup. Keywords: RoomStore / useRoomState, auth login, create/join room, device permissions, UI component integration.
- [Implement RoomKit In-Meeting Call (Android/iOS/Flutter/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/call-user-to-room.md): Call APIs: RoomStore / useRoomState, callUserToRoom, acceptCall, rejectCall, cancelCall, getPendingCalls.
- [Manage RoomKit Participants (Android/iOS/Flutter/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/room-participant.md): Participant APIs: RoomParticipantStore / useRoomParticipantState, getParticipantList, setAdmin, kickParticipant, closeParticipantDevice, disableAllDevices.
- [Manage RoomKit Room Lifecycle (Android/iOS/Flutter/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/room-state.md): Room APIs: RoomStore / useRoomState, createRoom, joinRoom, leaveRoom, endRoom, updateRoomInfo, getRoomInfo.
- [Schedule RoomKit Meeting Rooms (Android/iOS/Flutter/Vue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/schedule-room.md): Scheduling APIs: RoomStore / useRoomState, schedule create/cancel, getScheduledRoomList, getScheduledAttendees.
- [Integrate Vue RoomKit Basic Beauty](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/beauty.md): Use RoomKit free beauty panel for smoothing, whitening and blushing with real-time preview and remote effect.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit Device Detection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/device-detection.md): Use useDeviceState API for pre-meeting camera, microphone, speaker and network quality detection.
- [Manage Vue RoomKit Device State](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/device-state.md): Use useDeviceState API to manage camera, microphone, speaker on/off and switching in meetings.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit In-Meeting Chat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/room-chat.md): Use useRoomChat API for in-meeting text, emoji, image real-time chat.
- [Render Vue RoomKit Video Layout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/room-view.md): Use useRoomView API for grid layout, sidebar layout and speaker mode video rendering with custom video overlays.
- [Implement Vue RoomKit Screen Sharing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/screen-share.md): Use useDeviceState API for screen sharing, system audio sharing and permission control.
- [Use Vue RoomKit Virtual Background](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/roomkit/features/virtual-background.md): Use TUIRoomKit virtual background plugin for background blur and custom background image replacement.
## WebRTC SDK
- [Integrate TRTC Web SDK Audio/Video Calling](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/integration.md): Quick integration guide for trtc-sdk-v5 covering SDK installation, instance creation, room entry and local audio/video publishing. Requires Node.js 18+, WebRTC browsers.
- [TRTC Web SDK API Quick Reference (Classes/Methods/Events)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/sdk-api-reference.md): Core anchors: TRTC.create, enterRoom/exitRoom, startLocalVideo/startLocalAudio, publish/subscribe, EVENT, ERROR_CODE.
- [AIDenoiser Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/ai-denoiser.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Param: assetsPath. Scenarios: keyboard/fan noise suppression and far-field denoise.
- [AudioMixer Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/audio-mixer.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Params: currentTime, loop, volume. Scenario: BGM mixing.
- [Autoplay Policy Handling (Chrome/Safari/iOS)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/auto-play-policy.md): Event and handling: AUTOPLAY_FAILED, enableAutoPlayDialog, custom dialog, user-gesture playback recovery.
- [Beauty Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/beauty.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Features: smoothing, whitening, face slimming, eye enlarge, stickers.
- [Custom Audio/Video Capture & Rendering](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/capture-rendering.md): Pass custom MediaStreamTrack to replace default camera/microphone capture, with custom remote video rendering control.
- [CDNStreaming Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/cdn-streaming.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Params: PublishMode, streamId, CDNStreamingOptions.
- [Use CrossRoom Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/cross-room.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 CrossRoom plugin for cross-room audio/video interaction between hosts (PK battles, cross-room co-hosting).
- [Device Change Detection Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/device-change.md): Event anchors: EVENT.DEVICE_CHANGED, EVENT.DEVICE_ERROR, ERROR_CODE.DEVICE_ERROR. Scenario: camera/mic hot-plug.
- [FaceDetection Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/face-detection.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Params: detectionInterval, minConfidence, missingTimeout.
- [NetworkQuality Monitoring](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/network-quality.md): Event anchor: EVENT.NETWORK_QUALITY. Metrics: uplink/downlink, rtt, loss, quality.
- [TRTC Web Plugin Index (Intent Search)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/overview.md): Plugin anchors: BasicBeauty, Beauty, VirtualBackground, AIDenoiser, AudioMixer, VideoMixer, CDNStreaming, DeviceDetector, NetworkQuality.
- [Firewall/Proxy Access (Nginx + coturn)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/proxy.md): Network params: websocketProxy, loggerProxy, TURN/STUN. Keywords: enterprise intranet, UDP restrictions, proxy forwarding.
- [RealtimeTranscriber Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/realtime-transcriber.md): Event anchor: EVENT.REALTIME_TRANSCRIBER_MESSAGE. Fields: sourceLanguage, translationTexts, isCompleted.
- [SmallStreamAutoSwitcher Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/small-stream-auto.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Params: rttPoorLimit, lossPoorLimit, goodDuration.
- [Small/Big Stream Optimization for Multi-party Calls](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/small-stream.md): Core approach: dual-stream encoding + subscribe small stream for visible region. Keywords: streamType, startRemoteVideo, updateRemoteVideo.
- [Detect WebRTC Browser Compatibility](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/support-detection.md): Detect current browser WebRTC support including H.264 codec capability and camera/microphone permissions.
- [Use TRTCVideoDecoder Fallback Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/video-decoder.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 TRTCVideoDecoder plugin for automatic fallback to software decoding (wasm) when hardware decoding fails.
- [Use VideoMixer Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/video-mixer.md): Use trtc-sdk-v5 VideoMixer plugin to mix camera, screen, text, images, video into one stream.
- [VirtualBackground Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/virtual-background.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Features: blur, custom background image, person segmentation.
- [VoiceChanger Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/voice-changer.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Param: voiceType. Scenario: real-time voice change.
- [Watermark Plugin](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/plugins/watermark.md): API anchors: startPlugin/updatePlugin/stopPlugin. Params: imageUrl, position, size, opacity.
- [Web TRTC Autoplay Restriction Troubleshooting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/webrtc/faq/web.md): Errors/events: AUTOPLAY_FAILED, EVENT, playback recovery after enterRoom. Keywords: iOS WebView, user gesture, muted autoplay.
## Native TRTC SDK API
- [TRTC SDK TRTCCloud API Reference (Android/iOS/C++)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/trtc/sdk-api-reference.md): Core methods: enterRoom, exitRoom, startLocalAudio, startLocalPreview, muteRemoteAudio for room lifecycle and media control.
- [TRTC SDK Event Callbacks Reference (Android/iOS/C++)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/trtc/event-callbacks.md): Complete SDK event callback list covering room state, user audio/video state changes and network quality notifications.
- [TRTC SDK Type Definitions Reference (Android/iOS/C++)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/trtc/type-definitions.md): Key SDK data structures including room entry parameters, video encoding configuration and network QoS policies.
- [TRTC SDK Statistics Reference (Android/iOS/C++)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/trtc/statistics.md): Audio/video quality statistics including bitrate, frame rate, resolution, packet loss and latency metrics.
- [TRTC SDK TXAudioEffectManager (Android/iOS/C++)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/trtc/audio-effect-api.md): Core methods: startPlayMusic, stopPlayMusic, setVoiceChangerType, setVoiceReverbType for BGM, voice changer, and reverb control.
- [TRTC SDK TXBeautyManager (Android/iOS)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/trtc/beauty-filter-api.md): Core methods: setBeautyStyle, setBeautyLevel, setWhitenessLevel, setRuddyLevel for smoothing, whitening, and ruddy tuning.
- [TRTC SDK TXDeviceManager (Android/iOS/C++)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/trtc/device-manager-api.md): Core methods: switchCamera, setSystemVolumeType, device enumeration and switching for camera/audio device management.
- [TRTC SDK Error Codes Reference (Android/iOS/C++)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/trtc/error-codes.md): Complete error and warning code list for diagnosing room entry failures, stream publishing/pulling issues.
## Native Live SDK API
- [Live SDK V2TXLivePremier Global Configuration (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/native-live/global-config-api.md): SDK global configuration API covering license setup, log level and console output initialization options.
- [Live SDK V2TXLivePusher API Reference (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/native-live/live-pusher-api.md): Core methods: startCamera, startMicrophone, startPush, stopPush for preview capture, device control, and push lifecycle.
- [Live SDK V2TXLivePlayer API Reference (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/native-live/live-player-api.md): Core methods: setRenderView, startLivePlay, stopPlay, setPlayoutVolume for playback rendering and volume control.
- [Live SDK V2TXLivePusherObserver Pusher Callbacks (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/native-live/pusher-event-callbacks.md): Complete pusher event callback list covering push status, first frame capture and microphone volume change notifications.
- [Live SDK V2TXLivePlayerObserver Player Callbacks (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/native-live/player-event-callbacks.md): Complete player event callback list covering connection state, audio/video playback state and volume change notifications.
- [Live SDK V2TXLiveDef Type Definitions (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/native-live/type-definitions.md): Key SDK data structures including video resolution, fill mode, rotation and other enum/config types.
- [Live SDK V2TXLiveCode Error Codes (Android/iOS/Flutter)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tencent-RTC/docs/main/en/native-live/error-codes.md): Complete error code list for diagnosing stream pushing failures, pulling exceptions and capture issues.
